result.evidence_summary: The Spirit of the Rivers Loppet is mentioned in multiple sources as a real cross-country ski race held in Prince George, BC at the Caledonia Nordic Centre. A news article from the Prince George Citizen references the race with specific registration details (zone4.ca, race fees $30 for 30km). However, no official dedicated website, race results archive, or recent confirmation of current operations were found in the search results.
